title: Dealing with temporary tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tmp(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO tmp(id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'Boundary');
CREATE TABLE tapestry(id INTEGER, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO tapestry(id, description) SELECT id, name FROM tmp WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Temporary table deletion after data insertion
